## Hello world

- A "Hello, world" program is usually a simple computer program that displays on the screen (often the console) a message similar to "Hello, world".
- A small piece of code in most general-purpose programming languages, this program is used to illustrate a language's basic syntax.
- Such a program is often the first written by a student of a new programming language, but it can also be used as a sanity check to ensure that the computer software intended to compile or run source code is correctly installed, and that its operator understands how to use it.
- Hello World: The Motown Solo Collection is a three-disc compilation album by American singer Michael Jackson, released on September 1, 2009 (posthumously, shortly after his death on June 25, 2009), by Hip-O Select and Motown Records.
- Apr 21, 2026 · As described in more detail in the related Wikipedia article, Hello, world!
- is a classic "first program" one creates when learning a new programming language.
- The objective of the application is the same: to print the text "Hello, world!" to the screen in some form, be it console output or a dialog.
- Hello-world.com: Learn languages with games, songs and vocabulary, Total immersion, Serious fun!
- In this example, we will learn to create a simple program named "Hello World" in C++ programming.
- A "Hello, World!" is a simple program that outputs Hello, World!


**Sources:**

- [Hello, world](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Hello,_world)

- [Hello World: The Motown Solo Collection](https://grokipedia.com/page/hello_world_the_motown_solo_collection)

- [Hello, world! - Wikiversity](https://en.wikiversity.org/wiki/Hello,_world!)

- [Total immersion, Serious fun! with Hello-World!](https://www.hello-world.com/)

- [C++ "Hello, World!" Program](https://www.programiz.com/cpp-programming/examples/print-sentence)

A small piece of code in most general-purpose programming languages, this program is used to illustrate a language's basic syntax. Such a program is often the first written by a student of a new programming language, but it can also be used as a sanity check to ensure that the computer software intended to compile or run source code is correctly installed, and that its operator understands how to use it.
